name: Canvas Tote
description: Heavy cotton canvas tote with reinforced handles. Fits a laptop, a notebook, and the rest of your day.

name: Ceramic Mug
description: Hand-thrown stoneware mug in a matte glaze. Holds 12oz, safe for the dishwasher and microwave.

name: Wool Throw
description: Lambswool throw, woven in a small mill. Warm without the bulk, finished with a whipped edge.

name: Notebook, Ruled
description: A5 notebook with a stitched spine and 160 pages of 100gsm paper that takes fountain pen ink well.
